title: Military Family Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Military Family Support Groups 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS RANCH VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups and Alcohol Anonymous meetings. 65920 SW 61st Street Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Must be a veteran Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 706-9062 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers advocacy, support, and connection by providing space for camaraderie and conversation, a thrift store, military merchandise sales, treat boxes, quilts, cookies for troops, disposal and retirement of old flags, visitation to veterans who are housebound or in nursing homes, and opportunities to amplify veteran voices and stories. 180 W Idaho Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Veterans, service members, and their families. Volunteering and support is unrestricted. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 889-1978 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL OREGON VETERANS RANCH VETERAN SUPPORT GROUPS VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT FOR VETERANS
